mapper.select: SELECT rv.vehicle_id AS vehicleId, rv.room_id AS roomId, rv.plate_no AS plateNo, rv.vehicle_type AS vehicleType, rv.owner_name AS ownerName, rv.owner_phone AS ownerPhone, rv.valid_start AS validStart, rv.valid_end AS validEnd, rv.status, rv.remark, rv.del_flag AS delFlag, rv.create_by AS createBy, rv.create_time AS createTime, rv.update_by AS updateBy, rv.update_time AS updateTime, r.name AS roomName FROM biz_room_vehicle rv LEFT JOIN ics_room r ON r.id = rv.room_id WHERE rv.del_flag = '0' AND rv.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY rv.create_time DESC, rv.vehicle_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_room_vehicle WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND plate_no = #{plateNo} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_room_vehicle SET del_flag = '1', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE vehicle_id = #{vehicleId} AND del_flag = '0'
